content:
Even in the face of many difficult challenges, we chose to stand our ground. Every operational crisis dealt us heavy blows, yet we kept getting back up to rebuild the team. Because we know that you, too, confront the unspeakable madness and still choose to press forward with courage each time. You trigger “Death Resistance” again and again, refusing to give up until the very end. As long as you are here, we will not give up.

Thank you to our global players for your long-standing support, and to our new players in Japan for your enthusiasm. Every contribution you make will be reinvested into the game’s development as much as possible. Not only are we confident in completing the current expansion, but we’ve also begun laying the groundwork for brand-new content beyond our fourth year!

The B.I.A.V.Studio team’s “combat power” is leveling up as well! We’re bringing on a new localization specialist to accelerate English translation. We’re also adding several new artists to improve our production capacity. In addition, many members who left during the EOS crisis are returning. Of course, new and returning teammates will need some time to ramp up, so the impact may take a few months to fully show—thank you for your patience.

I believe we are on the right path, and I offer my heartfelt thanks to Keepers around the world. May the Silver Key continue to guide us!

过去面对诸多困难的挑战局面，我们依然选择坚守，每一次经营危机都让我们遭遇重大挫折，但我们依然选择爬起来重整团队。因为我们知道各位面对不可名状的疯狂，却依然每一次都选择了勇敢前进，大家每一次触发死亡抵抗，也没有放弃战斗到最后。只要大家还在这里，那么我们也不会放弃。

感谢全球服玩家的长久支持，与日本地区新玩家的喜爱。大家贡献的每一份资金，我们都将尽可能重新投入在游戏开发中。目前不仅我们有充足的信心完成当前的资料片，我们还会在不久之后开始构思第四年往后的全新内容！

脑缸组团队成员的战力也将得到增强！我们将引入一位新的本地化人才，加快英文翻译的进度节奏。我们也在引入数位新的美术成员，来改善产能。除此之外，受 EOS 危机影响曾离开的许多成员正在回归！当然团队成员加入后需要一些时间来适应，可能要数月后才能逐渐体现，还请大家耐心等待。

我相信我们走在正确的道路上，我衷心感谢全世界所有的守密人们。愿银钥继续指引我们！
thread_title: 校猫碎碎念#May the Silver Key continue to guide us 愿银钥继续指引我们
